channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder: How Silicon Valley protects its CEOs
item.description: Trying to keep tech leaders safe in a country awash with guns, and in an industry that can generate volatile emotions, does not come cheaply.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: This new AI technology enhances video analysis by detecting human actions in real time
item.description: SMAST AI tool transforms video analysis for public safety, healthcare, and autonomous navigation through advanced action recognition.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How to watch the I'm A Celeb final 2024 online from anywhere and for free
item.description: Coleen Rooney, Oti Mabuse, Danny Jones or Alan Halsall will be crowned the King or Queen of the Jungle. Here’s how you can watch the 2024 I'm A Celeb final online from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: OpenAI releases o1 LLM, unveils ChatGPT Pro
item.description: OpenAI has officially released its OpenAI o1 large language model (LLM), built for complex reasoning. The company also introduced ChatGPT Pro, a $200 monthly plan that includes unlimited access to OpenAI o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and advanced voice conversations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk spent at least $250M to help elect Trump, filings show
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk spent at least $250 million to help propel President-elect Trump back into the White House, the latest reports filed with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) show.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Musk signals he won't use growing influence to go after competitors
item.description: Elon Musk indicated Friday that he will not use his growing influence in the Trump administration to hurt or seek revenge on his industry competitors.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Apple is about to add seriously useful tools to Apple Intelligence
item.description: Apple is close to introducing iOS 18.2, a major update that brings significant additions to Apple Intelligence, its suite of generative AI (genAI) tools. Highlights of this AI-tinged release include the integration of Siri with ChatGPT, along with new writing and imaging tools.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The EU makes an urgent TikTok inquiry on Russia's role in Romanian election turmoil
item.description: The European Union has sent TikTok an urgent request for more information about Romanian intelligence files suggesting that Moscow coordinated influencers on its platform to promote an election candidate who became the surprise front-runner in the nation’s presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Get ready to build your own Lego masterpieces with this new tech
item.description: Brick My World is an innovative app that allows you to turn any object into a Lego creation with your phone using advanced artificial intelligence and mobile scanning technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US and China Trade Tensions Escalate Over Critical Minerals
item.description: The US and China are engaged in a high-stakes trade dispute over access to critical minerals, sparking concerns about global supply chains.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Michigan Democrats move to protect reproductive health data before GOP takes control of House
item.description: Democrats in Michigan are pressing to pass reproductive health care legislation before the party loses its majority with the new legislative session next year.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Volmert, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Berkeley changes zoning to encourage growth in innovation sector
item.description: Councilmembers voted Tuesday to permit labs studying biosafety levels 2 in mixed-use light industrial zoning areas while prohibiting BSL 3 and 4 uses in all parts of the city.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Lopez, The Mercury News

item.title: Meta: AI created less than 1% of the disinformation around 2024 elections
item.description: AI-generated content accounted for less than 1% of the disinformation fact-checkers linked to political elections that took place worldwide in 2024, according to social media giant Meta.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google says its AI agent outperformed the world's best weather predictions
item.description: Google said Wednesday its artificial intelligence (AI) agent outperformed the world’s best weather predictions.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Cisco strengthens AWS integration to speed troubleshooting in multicloud environments
item.description: Cisco this week said it has bolstered integrations between its own hybrid cloud offerings and Amazon Web Services (AWS) to improve visibility and help enterprise customers more accurately troubleshoot application availability issues across multicloud networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Alleged Chinese cyberattack: FBI urges encrypted apps
item.description: Salt Typhoon, a Chinese government-linked hacking group, is one of the largest intelligence breaches in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Bitcoin hits $100K after Trump names pro-crypto SEC chair
item.description: Bitcoin surged to more than $100,000 per coin on Wednesday after President-elect Trump announced Paul Atkins, a cryptocurrency aficionado, would be nominated to head the Security Exchange Commission (SEC). Google valued the coin at 102,726 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: This GSA official takes on the dark underside of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: "We need AI tools in place to help us plan around climate events, to help us plan around looking at ways in which we can accommodate," said Dan Pomeroy. The post This GSA official takes on the dark underside of Artificial Intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX
item.description: Explore what’s next for HISP agencies as they transform customer, employee and total experience The post High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OECD: GenAI is affecting jobs previously thought safe from automation
item.description: According to a new report from the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), generative AI (genAI) will soon affect work areas previously considered to have a low likelihood of automation, according to The Register.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AWS upgrades its 10p10u network to handle massive AI clusters
item.description: While virtualized compute is the foundation of cloud computing, enabling all that compute to transmit data is the job of the network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Max to begin cracking down on password sharing next week
item.description: Max will begin its password-sharing crackdown next week, beginning with "very early, gentle messaging" directed at high-usage users.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Meta quietly leans on rival GPT-4 despite Zuckerberg’s bold Llama claims
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has consistently championed Meta’s Llama AI model as a leader in generative AI technology, positioning it as a strong competitor to OpenAI and Google. However, behind the scenes, Meta is complementing Llama with a rival AI model to meet its internal needs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft moves to stop M365 Copilot from ‘oversharing’ data
item.description: As Microsoft pushes for businesses to adopt its Microsoft 365 Copilot, many customers have run into a major stumbling block: the AI assistant’s ability to surface confidential information to employees.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cython tutorial: How to speed up Python
item.description: Python is a powerful programming language that is easy to learn and easy to work with, but it is not always the fastest to run—especially when you’re dealing with math or statistics.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
